ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the patient is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province or state where the patient is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the patient is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current health status of the patient (e.g., released, isolated, hospitalized) */,
  "infection_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the infection source of the patient */,
  "confirmed_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was confirmed to be infected */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the patient is being treated */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the patient */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Test results and dates */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Comorbidities or underlying health conditions */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history relevant to the infection */,
  "quarantine_location" TEXT /* Location where the patient is quarantined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_infection_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("infection_case_id") REFERENCES infection_sources ("infection_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infection_sources" (
  "infection_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infection source */,
  "infection_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the infection source (e.g., contact with patient, overseas inflow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the infection source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of infection source (e.g., human, environmental) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the infection source */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the infection source became active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the infection source was contained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infection_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the hospital */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the hospital */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the hospital */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of patients */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose status is being logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current health status of the patient */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_status_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_status_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province or state of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "distance_to_nearest_health_facility" REAL /* Distance to the nearest health facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infection_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specific infection case */,
  "infection_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the infection source */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific infection case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specific infection case */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the specific case started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the specific case was contained */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of patients related to the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_cases_infection_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("infection_case_id") REFERENCES infection_sources ("infection_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare worker, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the health agency */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the health agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the health agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the health agency */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director of the agency */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the agency */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_agency_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being assigned */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health agency to which the patient is assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_agency_assignments_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES health_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_agency_assignments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
